nasb.text: So your life shall hang in doubt before you; and you will be in dread night and day, and shall have no assurance of your life.

esv.text: Your life shall hang in doubt before you. Night and day you shall be in dread and have no assurance of your life.

cnv.text: 你未來的生命必懸而不定；你必晝夜恐懼，生命難保。

ccb.text: 你们必惴惴不安，昼夜恐惧，生死难料。
